G3954.derivation: from G3956 (πᾶς) and a derivative of G4483 (ῥέω);
G3954.strongs_def: all out-spokenness, i.e. frankness, bluntness, publicity; by implication, assurance
G3954.kjv_def: bold (X -ly, -ness, -ness of speech), confidence, X freely, X openly, X plainly(-ness)

G3982.strongs_def: to convince (by argument, true or false); by analogy, to pacify or conciliate (by other fair means); reflexively or passively, to assent (to evidence or authority), to rely (by inward certainty)
G3982.kjv_def: agree, assure, believe, have confidence, be (wax) conflent, make friend, obey, persuade, trust, yield

G3975.derivation: from a derivative of G4078 (πήγνυμι) (meaning thick);
G3975.strongs_def: to thicken, i.e. (by implication) to fatten (figuratively, stupefy or render callous)

G3993.derivation: from a primary (to toil for daily subsistence);

G3944.strongs_def: to escape along, i.e. be gone

G3951.strongs_def: to urge along, i.e. stimulate (to hostility)

G3977.derivation: from a derivative of G4228 (πούς) (meaning the ground);

G3997.derivation: strengthened from the alternate of G3958 (πάσχω);

G3990.derivation: from a derivative of G4141 (πλήσσω) (meaning an axe);
G3990.strongs_def: to chop off (the head), i.e. truncate

G3939.strongs_def: to dwell near, i.e. reside as a foreigner

G3952.derivation: from the present participle of G3918 (πάρειμι);
G3952.strongs_def: a being near, i.e. advent (often, return; specially, of Christ to punish Jerusalem, or finally the wicked); (by implication) physically, aspect

G3979.derivation: dative case feminine of a derivative of G4228 (πούς) (as adverb);

G3992.strongs_def: to dispatch (from the subjective view or point of departure, whereas (as a stronger form of ) refers rather to the objective point or terminus ad quem, and G4724 (στέλλω) denotes properly, the orderly motion involved), especially on a temporary errand; also to transmit, bestow, or wield

G3923.strongs_def: to bear in alongside, i.e. introduce simultaneously

G3918.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and G1510 (εἰμί) (including its various forms);
G3918.strongs_def: to be near, i.e. at hand; neuter present participle (singular) time being, or (plural) property
G3918.kjv_def: come, X have, be here, + lack, (be here) present

G3983.derivation: from the same as G3993 (πένης) (through the idea of pinching toil;
G3983.strongs_def: "pine"); to famish (absolutely or comparatively); figuratively, to crave

G3909.strongs_def: to chance near, i.e. fall in with

G3960.strongs_def: to knock (gently or with a weapon or fatally)

G3937.derivation: probably by contraction for (a derivative of a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G3306 (μένω));

G3988.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G3982 (πείθω);

G3961.derivation: from a derivative probably of G3817 (παίω) (meaning a "path");

G3996.strongs_def: to grieve (the feeling or the act)

G3998.derivation: prolongation from the base of G3993 (πένης);

G3986.strongs_def: a putting to proof (by experiment (of good), experience (of evil), solicitation, discipline or provocation); by implication, adversity

G3963.strongs_def: Patmus, an islet in the Mediterranean

G3900.strongs_def: a side-slip (lapse or deviation), i.e. (unintentional) error or (wilful) transgression

G3955.strongs_def: to be frank in utterance, or confident in spirit and demeanor

G3958.strongs_def: to experience a sensation or impression (usually painful)

G3942.derivation: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and perhaps a derivative of G3633 (οἴομαι);
G3942.strongs_def: apparently a state alongside of supposition, i.e. (concretely) an adage; specially, an enigmatical or fictitious illustration

G3965.derivation: as if feminine of a derivative of G3962 (πατήρ);
G3965.strongs_def: paternal descent, i.e. (concretely) a group of families or a whole race (nation)

G3933.strongs_def: a maiden; by implication, an unmarried daughter

G3978.strongs_def: to foot a journey, i.e. travel by land

G3947.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and a derivative of G3691 (ὀξύς);
G3947.strongs_def: to sharpen alongside, i.e. (figuratively) to exasperate

G3972.strongs_def: (little; but remotely from a derivative of G3973 (παύω), meaning the same); Paulus, the name of a Roman and of an apostle

G3969.derivation: perhaps a contraction for (a compound of G3962 (πατήρ) and G979 (βίος));

G3936.strongs_def: to stand beside, i.e. (transitively) to exhibit, proffer, (specially), recommend, (figuratively) substantiate; or (intransitively) to be at hand (or ready), aid
G3936.kjv_def: assist, bring before, command, commend, give presently, present, prove, provide, shew, stand (before, by, here, up, with), yield

G3919.strongs_def: to lead in aside, i.e. introduce surreptitiously

G3956.derivation: including all the forms of declension; apparently a primary word;
G3956.kjv_def: all (manner of, means), alway(-s), any (one), X daily, + ever, every (one, way), as many as, + no(-thing), X thoroughly, whatsoever, whole, whosoever
G3956.usage: all(748x), every(117x), whosoever(31x), everyone(28x), whole(12x), any(7x), whatsoever(6x)

G3928.strongs_def: to come near or aside, i.e. to approach (arrive), go by (or away), (figuratively) perish or neglect, (causative) avert
G3928.kjv_def: come (forth), go, pass (away, by, over), past, transgress

G3925.derivation: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G1685 (ἐμβάλλω);
G3925.strongs_def: a throwing in beside (juxtaposition), i.e. (specially), battle-array, encampment or barracks (tower Antonia)

G3906.strongs_def: to inspect alongside, i.e. note insidiously or scrupulously

G3910.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and a derivative of G846 (αὐτός);
G3910.strongs_def: at the very instant, i.e. momentary

G3902.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G4591 (σημαίνω);
G3902.strongs_def: side-marked, i.e. labelled (with a badge (figure-head) of a ship)

G3985.strongs_def: to test (objectively), i.e. endeavor, scrutinize, entice, discipline
G3985.kjv_def: assay, examine, go about, prove, tempt(-er), try
G3985.usage: tempt(29x), try(4x), tempter(2x), prove(1x), assay(1x), examine(1x)

G3908.strongs_def: to place alongside, i.e. present (food, truth); by implication, to deposit (as a trust or for protection)
G3908.kjv_def: allege, commend, commit (the keeping of), put forth, set before

G3914.strongs_def: to winter near, i.e. stay with over the rainy season

G3916.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and G5536 (χρῆμα) (in its original sense);
G3916.strongs_def: at the thing itself, i.e. instantly

G3980.derivation: from a compound of G3982 (πείθω) and G757 (ἄρχω);
G3980.strongs_def: to be persuaded by a ruler, i.e. (genitive case) to submit to authority; by analogy, to conform to advice

G3973.strongs_def: to stop (transitively or intransitively), i.e. restrain, quit, desist, come to an end

G3901.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the alternate of G4482 (ῥέω);
G3901.strongs_def: to flow by, i.e. (figuratively) carelessly pass (miss)

G3903.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and a derivative of G4632 (σκεῦος);
G3903.strongs_def: to furnish aside, i.e. get ready

G3921.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and a compound of G1519 (εἰς) and G1416 (δύνω);
G3921.strongs_def: to settle in alongside, i.e. lodge stealthily

G3905.strongs_def: to extend along, i.e. prolong (in point of time)

G3931.derivation: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and a derivative of G58 (ἀγορά) (meaning to harangue an assembly);

G3962.strongs_def: a "father" (literally or figuratively, near or more remote)

G3970.derivation: from G3962 (πατήρ) and a derivative of G3860 (παραδίδωμι) (in the sense of handing over or down);

G3964.derivation: from G3962 (πατήρ) and the same as the latter part of G3389 (μητραλῴας);

G3930.strongs_def: to hold near, i.e. present, afford, exhibit, furnish occasion
G3930.kjv_def: bring, do, give, keep, minister, offer, shew, + trouble
G3930.usage: give(3x), bring(2x), show(2x), keep(1x), minister(1x), offer(1x)

G3953.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G3795 (ὀψάριον);

G3927.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G1927 (ἐπιδημέω);
G3927.strongs_def: an alien alongside, i.e. a resident foreigner

G3922.strongs_def: to come in alongside, i.e. supervene additionally or steathily

G3989.strongs_def: deep or open sea, i.e. the main

G3959.strongs_def: Patara, a place in Asia Minor

G3934.strongs_def: a Parthian, i.e. inhabitant of Parthia

G3984.derivation: from the base of G4008 (πέραν) (through the idea of piercing);

G3941.strongs_def: having a home near, i.e. (as noun) a by-dweller (alien resident)

G3968.strongs_def: a father-land, i.e. native town; (figuratively) heavenly home

G3957.strongs_def: the Passover (the meal, the day, the festival or the special sacrifices connected with it)

G3911.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and G5342 (φέρω) (including its alternate forms);
G3911.strongs_def: to bear along or aside, i.e. carry off (literally or figuratively); by implication, to avert

G3943.strongs_def: staying near wine, i.e. tippling (a toper)
